messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0089",
  "title": "数据描述",
  "page_index": 27,
  "page_range": "27"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0090",
    "title": "市场收入规模（柱状图）",
    "page_range": "27",
    "summary": "This section presents annual market revenue data from 2021 to 2025, visualized as a bar chart. It supports retrieval for questions regarding:\n- **Topics & Metrics:** Market revenue scale and year-over-year financial performance (unit: 亿元).\n- **Dates & Values:** Specific annual revenue figures for 2021 (364.8), 2022 (350.8), 2023 (347.2), 2024 (361.0), and 2025 (364.6).\n- **Figures & Evidence Types:** A bar chart providing quantitative, time-series financial evidence.\n- **Claims & Trends:** A temporary market revenue decline from 2021–2023, followed by a recovery and projected growth through 2025.\nThe section does not contain definitions, procedures, or specific named entities beyond the implied market context."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0091",
    "title": "增长率（折线图）",
    "page_range": "27",
    "summary": "This section answers questions regarding annual growth rate trends and specific year-over-year percentage changes from 2021 to 2025. \n- **Topics & Metrics:** Annual growth rate percentages.\n- **Entities & Dates:** Consecutive year-over-year intervals: 2021–2022, 2022–2023, 2023–2024, and 2024–2025.\n- **Figures:** Line chart (折线图) used for visualization.\n- **Claims & Evidence:** Quantitative data points: -3.82% (2021–2022), -1.05% (2022–2023), 3.98% (2023–2024), and 0.99% (2024–2025), evidencing a shift from negative to positive growth.\n- **Answerable Questions:** What were the exact growth rates for each annual period between 2021 and 2025? How did the growth trend change over these years? What chart type displays this data?\n- **Absent Elements:** No definitions, procedures, or tabular data are included."
  }
]

message.content: This section, titled "数据描述" (Data Description) on page 27, provides a quantitative overview of market financial performance from 2021 to 2025. It covers two primary topics: annual market revenue scale and year-over-year growth rates. The content is visualized using a bar chart for revenue metrics (unit: 亿元) and a line chart for growth rate percentages. Specific dates and values include annual revenues of 364.8 (2021), 350.8 (2022), 347.2 (2023), 361.0 (2024), and 364.6 (2025), alongside YoY growth rates of -3.82% (2021–2022), -1.05% (2022–2023), 3.98% (2023–2024), and 0.99% (2024–2025). Key claims indicate a temporary market revenue decline from 2021 to 2023, followed by a recovery and projected growth through 2025, corresponding to a shift from negative to positive annual growth. The section relies on quantitative, time-series financial evidence presented through charts. It does not contain definitions, procedures, tabular data, or specific named entities beyond the implied market context.
